Signature Moves

The Moves That Made The Brand

👆 Tap for The Clamp

The Clamp™

The bite heard around LA. When Antidote clamps down on your burger, taco, or cheesesteak, your food becomes the moment. Full commitment. Every time.

👆 Tap for the Drizzle

The Antidote Drizzle™

The signature pour. Syrup on pancakes, cheese on fries, sauce on shawarma — the Drizzle turns your best dish into a cinematic slow-motion event fans wait for.
